name: seek-job-analyser
description: Chrome extension: AI-powered inline job fit scoring on SEEK

scripts.build: esbuild src/background.ts src/content.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --platform=browser --target=chrome120 --format=esm && esbuild src/options.ts src/popup.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --platform=browser --target=chrome120 --format=iife
